title: Crushing, Grinding, and Polishing Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders
description: Set up, operate, or tend machines to crush, grind, or polish materials, such as coal, glass, grain, stone, food, or rubber.

tasks.text: Observe operation of equipment to ensure continuity of flow, safety, and efficient operation, and to detect malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, adjust, and maintain equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tend accessory equipment, such as pumps and conveyors, to move materials or ingredients through production processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move controls to start, stop, or adjust machinery and equipment that crushes, grinds, polishes, or blends materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Notify supervisors of needed repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh or measure materials, ingredients, or products at specified intervals to ensure conformance to requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record data from operations, testing, and production on specified forms.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Reject defective products and readjust equipment to eliminate problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect chains, belts, or scrolls for signs of wear.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Clean work areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine materials, ingredients, or products, visually or with hands, to ensure conformance to established standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read work orders to determine production specifications and information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dislodge and clear jammed materials or other items from machinery and equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test samples of materials or products to ensure compliance with specifications, using test equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark bins as to types of mixtures stored.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transfer materials, supplies, and products between work areas, using moving equipment and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Add or mix chemicals and ingredients for processing, using hand tools or other devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect samples of materials or products for laboratory testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load materials into machinery and equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn valves to regulate the moisture contents of materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set mill gauges to specified fineness of grind.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
